issue_summary: Added getDuration(DurationType); default duration type is average-year-month.
javadoc_before:
/** * Gets the duration of this time interval. *

* The duration returned will always be precise because it is relative to * a known date. * * @return the duration of the time interval */
javadoc_after:
/** * Gets the duration of this time interval. *

* The duration returned will always be precise because it is relative to a * known date. If this interval was not specified with a precise duration * type, then the duration type defaults to ISO average-year-month type. * * @return the duration of the time interval */
